name: Equal Dutch Apple Pancake
recipeInstructions:
Combine batter ingredients in a blender or food processor; mix until smooth. Let rest 30 minutes.
For filling, melt margarine in a 10-inch oven-proof skillet. Add apple slices, sprinkle with cinnamon and toss over low heat for 3 minutes.
Pour batter over apples and place in preheated 425°F oven for 15 minutes.
Remove from oven. Blend glaze ingredients and drizzle over top of pancake.
Cut into 4 wedges to serve. Makes 4 servings, 1/4 pancake each.
Calories per serving: 229
"Traditional" calories: 450
Diabetic Exchange: 1 medium fat meat, 1 bread, 1 fruit, 1 fat
Source: Equal Delicious Recipes, c1983 Dee Penrod
